revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff

revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template link talk/doc]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[en:Template link talk/doc]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|tlt}} === Usage === The '''''template link talk''''' (tlt) template is used to display a template name as a link to the template, followed by a link to its talk page. :{{tlt|''template name to display''}} displays as : {{tlt|template name to display}} === Examples === {| class="wikitable" !Code !Result |- | {{tlt|cite web}} | {{tlt|cite web}} |- | {{tlt|cite book}} | {{tlt|cite book}} |- | {{tlt|coord}} | {{tlt|coord}} |- | {{tlt|tlt}} | {{tlt|tlt}} |- | {{tlt|tl}} | {{tlt|tl}} |} ===See also=== * {{tl|lts}} – See Lts discussion for more variants * {{tl|tlc}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in style * {{tl|tld}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tlf}} – Not linked, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl}} – Template link, no parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tl2}} – Template link, allows up to 3 parameters and interwiki links, displays code style * {{tl|tlp}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters, displays text in normal text style * {{tl|tlx}} – Template link, allows up to 8 parameters and interwiki links, displays text in teletype text style * {{tl|tn}} – Same as {{tlf|tl}}, but shows the braces as part of the link * {{tl|tlu}} – Like {{Tlx|Tl}} / {{Tlx|Tlp}} for any namespace * {{tl|tlsp}} – Template link, ditto subst'ed * {{tl|tlb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tl}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tlxb}} – Same as {{Tl|Tlx}}, but gives the template name in boldface type (this can be useful when stressing the difference between two similarly named templates) * {{tl|tltt}} and {{Tl|Tltt2}} – Template link with tooltip, with no and one parameter respectively * {{tl|tlrow}} – For showing templates and their properties in a table * {{tl|xpd}} – Shows live (expanded) example * {{lts|ttl}} * {{lts|ti}} * {{lts|tic}} * {{lts|cl}} * {{lts|tlt}} * {{lts|tetl}} * {{cl|Internal template-link templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
